[[af:Aardos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-tiū]][[de:Erde-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de terre]][[hak:Kí-chhiú]][[ja:己丑]][[ko:기축]][[nds:Eer-Oss]][[vi:Kỷ Sửu]][[za:Geijcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-thiú]][[zh-yue:己丑]][[zh:己丑]]

'''Yin Earth Ox also known as Jichou''' (己丑) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 26th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Earth Rat]] and followed by [[Yang Metal Tiger]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]] theory, the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] represents yin [[Earth]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] also represents yin [[Earth]], making this a [[:en:Five Elements|harmonious combination]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Ox (己丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 cau2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: kichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gichuk (기축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Sửu

==Years of Yin Earth Ox==
A year is Jichou if the remainder when divided by 60 is 29.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Jichou'''
|-
! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* 29
* 89
* 149
* 209
* 269
* 329
* 389
* 449
* 509
* 569
* 629
* 689
* 749
* 809
* 869
* 929
* 989
|
* 1049
* 1109
* 1169
* 1229
* 1289
* 1349
* 1409
* 1469
* 1529
* 1589
* 1649
* 1709
* 1769
* 1829
* 1889
* 1949
|
* 2009
* 2069
* 2129
* 2189
* 2249
* 2309
* 2369
* 2429
* 2489
* 2549
* 2609
* 2669
* 2729
* 2789
* 2849
* 2909
* 2969
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Ox==
In years ending in 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stem is [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the twelfth lunar month is a Jichou month. This is determined based on the [[:en:Chinese lunisolar calendar|Chinese lunisolar calendar]], meaning it may also be calculated using the [[Solar term]] system (from [[:en:Lesser Cold|Lesser Cold]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Spring|Beginning of Spring]]).

==Days of Yin Earth Ox==
A Jichou day follows a 60-day cycle.

=== Special Characteristics ===
Jichou days are the 6th day in the [[Ten Days of Mourning|Ten Days of Mourning]] (十方暮).
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Chinese calendar]]

{{wikidata link|Q1061992}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
